title: Delicate Dutch Steak Skillet
description: A crowd-pleasing Dutch dish featuring fillet of steak with a mustardy and crisp flavor, made with a yuzu-cure and cooked to perfection on a tava-griddle.
instructions: Preheat the tava-griddle to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, whisk together yuzu juice and Dijon mustard to make the yuzu-cure.
Rub the fillet steak with the yuzu-cure, making sure to coat it evenly.
Season the steak with salt, black pepper, and garlic powder.
Add olive oil to the preheated tava-griddle and swirl it around to coat the surface.
Place the steak on the tava-griddle and sear for 3-4 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 135 degrees Fahrenheit.
Once the steak is cooked, remove it from the tava-griddle and let it rest for a few minutes.
Slice the steak against the grain and serve it with chopped fresh parsley on top.
